title: Cold and Respiratory Relief
description: Natural Homeopathic remedies that help to relieve symptoms of cold, chronic cough or wheezing, COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease), influenza (flu), industrial lung diseases due to tobacco dust, asbestos dust, construction dust, rattling of chest, hoarseness of voice, laryngitis, nasal polyp, etc. are successfully treated with homeopathic medicines.

title: Migraine, Vertigo and Headache Care
description: Gentle and effective treatments for chronic migraine, vertigo and headaches of different origins, offering long-term relief without side effects.

title: Hair Loss & Scalp Health
description: homoeopathic solutions that address the root causes of hair fall, dandruff, and scalp issues to promote healthy, natural hair growth.

title: Kidney Stone Relief
description: Safe and natural remedies that help to dissolve different sizes of kidney stones without surgery and also best medicines for painful urination, bloody urine, albuminous urine, casts and pus in urine, difficulty in urination, and frequency in urination.

title: PCOS & Hormonal Imbalance
description: PCOS can be treated as per symptoms with 100 percent cure. Female complaints such as delayed puberty, dysmenorrhoea (painful menstruation), menorrhagia (heavy bleeding), metrorrhagia (irregular periods), oligomenorrhoea (no menstruation), leucorrhoea (white discharge) are effectively treated. Gynecological problems are managed well with homeopathic medicines by correcting the root cause and hormonal imbalance.

title: Child Care & Wellness
description: Gentle and safe remedies for childhood complaints such as cough, cold, running nose, fever, flu, tonsillitis, sore throat, hand-foot-mouth disease, ear infection, conjunctivitis, dentition problems, worm infestation, stomach issues, bed wetting, chicken pox, measles, mumps, skin issues, adenoids, and nose bleeding.

title: Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS)
description: Affects approximately 4.2 to 7.5 percent of Indians, especially in urban areas due to stress, diet, and lifestyle. Symptoms include chronic abdominal pain, bloating, diarrhea or constipation. Common under age 50. Homeopathy offers excellent results not only for IBS but also for gastric and duodenal ulcers.

title: Depression
description: According to WHO, depression affects about 5.7 percent of adults and is more common in women. It impacts daily life and can be severe. Homeopathic antidepressants play a vital role in treatment through individualized care.

title: Skin Diseases
description: Skin diseases are caused by allergy, infection, genetics, diet, stress, bacteria, viruses, fungi, or parasites. Symptoms include redness, itching, burning, and rashes. Homeopathy effectively treats eczema, psoriasis, acne, dermatitis, vitiligo, sunburns, ringworm, hives, herpes zoster, and more.

title: Piles
description: Piles (hemorrhoids) are swollen veins in the rectum causing pain, bleeding, itching, and constipation. Causes include obesity, pregnancy, family history, chronic cough, or prolonged sitting. Homeopathy treats piles effectively without surgery after proper assessment.

title: Urinary Tract Infection (UTI)
description: Caused mainly by E. coli infection leading to painful and frequent urination, cloudy urine, and pelvic pain. Risk factors include diabetes, kidney stones, prostate enlargement, and catheter use. Homeopathic remedies like Cantharis, Lycopodium, and Berberis vulgaris provide effective relief with individualized treatment.

title: Diseases of Bone and Joints
description: Conditions such as frozen shoulder, back pain, sprains, rheumatoid arthritis, gout, sciatica, and sports injuries are successfully treated with homeopathic medication.

title: Endocrine and Metabolic Disorders
description: Hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, thyroid nodules, high cholesterol, triglycerides, and calcium disorders are treated using nosodes, sarcodes, and Schuessler's biochemic cell salts.

title: Common Diseases We Treat
description: Includes lifestyle diseases, ENT problems, abscess, boils, anxiety neurosis, gas, ulcers, mouth ulcers, hyperacidity, anal fissure, fistula, blood in urine, acid reflux, sebaceous cyst, sleeplessness, stress, fatty liver, jaundice, poor appetite, itching, bleeding gums, calcaneal spur, chronic liver disease, diaper rashes, food allergies, peptic ulcers, gall bladder stones, and sciatica.
